idea-plugin.name: agentic-security
idea-plugin.description: Inline security findings from the agentic-security scanner (SAST, SCA, secrets, IaC, prompt-injection, MCP/agent-tool audit). Findings appear as squiggles in the editor and in the Problems tool window. Auto-fix and detailed remediation are available via the Claude Code plugin or the CLI (npx agentic-security fix --one <id>).

server.name: agentic-security
server.description: Wraps the agentic-security-lsp bin (npm: @clearcapabilities/agentic-security-scanner). Emits security diagnostics on save.
